description: Fix eye detection system to detect gaze direction (eyes looking away from screen) instead of just face presence. Use face-api.js 68-point face landmarks to calculate eye gaze direction and only trigger warnings when the candidate's eyes/gaze look away from the questions panel.
steps: Rewrite static/js/eye_detection.js to load faceLandmark68TinyNet model alongside tinyFaceDetector
Implement gaze direction detection using eye landmarks (points 36-41 left eye, 42-47 right eye)
Calculate iris position relative to eye corners to determine if looking left/right/up/down
Only trigger warning when gaze is off-center for more than 3 seconds (not when face is just present)
Keep existing warning UI system (overlay, notification, max 5 warnings)
acceptance_criteria: Warning is only triggered when eyes look away from screen, not when face is present looking at screen
Uses face-api.js face landmarks for gaze direction calculation
Keeps same warning UI with 5 max warnings
Falls back gracefully if landmarks model fails to load
verification: Verify static/js/eye_detection.js uses faceLandmark68TinyNet and calculates gaze direction
